references.text: Nickrent, DL, V Malécot, R Vidal-Russell & JP Der. 2010. A revised classification of Santalales. Taxon 59: 538-558
Sleumer, H. 1984. Olacaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 10: 1-29

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 9 August 2025

species.citation: Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826) 921 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 115; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1984) 17. = Erythropalum grandifolium Elmer , LPB 8 (1915) 2788.
species.distribution: Andaman Isls, Bangladesh, Borneo, Cambodia, China, India, Java, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Nepal, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Talaud Isls, Thailand, Tibet, Vietnam. ALABAT, BASILAN, BOHOL, CAMIGUIN DE BABUYANES, CATANDUANES, CEBU, LAGEN, LEYTE, LUZON: Abra, Albay, Apayao, Bataan, Batangas, Benguet, Bulacan, Cagayan, Camarines Sur, Ilocos Norte, Isabela, Laguna, Nueva Vizcaya, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Lanao del Sur, South Cotabato, Zamboanga del Norte (photos), Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAUI (photos), PALAWAN, POLILLO, SAMAR, SIARGAO, SIBUYAN, SULU ARCHIPELAGO.
